log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Hadozee — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Hadozee — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:7+9=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Hadozee — Unarmored Caster HP: 50/67
→ Hadozee — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 5 vs DC 10]
Frost Giant attacks Hadozee — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:7+9=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 26 damage. Hadozee — Unarmored Caster HP: 24/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Hadozee — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Hadozee — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Hadozee — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub: [d20:4+6=10 vs AC 15] MISS.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:2+3=5 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Hadozee — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub: [d20:13+6=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Hadozee — Unarmored Caster HP: 8/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Hadozee — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Hadozee — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Hadozee — Unarmored Caster.
→ Hadozee — Unarmored Caster healed for 7 HP. HP: 15/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Hadozee — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub: [d20:5+6=11 vs AC 15] MISS.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Hadozee — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 15] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Hadozee — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 27 damage. Hadozee — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
